tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: The tests use behavioral verification: _run_extractor actually starts an HTTP server and runs the extracted loadPage function, verifying request counts and outcomes. test_unhandled_rejection_handler executes the handler code in a subprocess. test_null_content_type_handled and test_retry_on_transient_failures both execute code and verify behavioral outcomes (request counts, status codes). These cannot be satisfied by trivial stubs.
